title: Better Pyramids & New Structure
description:
Upgrading Desert Pyramids
Adds new structure
body:
In this datapack Desert Pyramids is changed to now have room like mazes

More rooms/treasures will come in the future

The default Treasure room can still spawn

New Structure can now spawn, and void is extended but bedrock layer is the same

FYI: There might be bugs when it spawns in the world, but have fun :D

FIYY: Prehaps more/new structures will be added

# 26.1.X will be supported now for the future until 26.2 comes around


[If you think there is bugs, comment here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/better-desert-pyramid/)
